evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for MEMORY_HBM_CAPACITY; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: HBM changed the market frame from commodity memory to AI infrastructure bottleneck; 4B-watch is required after large rerating. Sources: Reuters SK Hynix AI memory rerating.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for SEMI_EQUIPMENT_CAPEX; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Large EUV order is CAPEX evidence for the equipment chain, but supplier revenue conversion must be backfilled. Sources: WSJ SK Hynix EUV order.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for SEMI_EQUIPMENT_CAPEX; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Guidance and packaging growth are aligned, but 180D/1Y MFE and margin durability remain open. Sources: Reuters Applied Materials guidance.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for ADVANCED_PACKAGING_COWOS_EMIB; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Reference case for CoWoS/EMIB economics; Korean supplier mapping must be source-backed. Sources: Reuters Nvidia advanced packaging bottleneck reference.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for OPTICAL_NETWORKING_AI_DATACENTER; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Optical and PCB lead-time evidence should route supplier research, not become automatic Green. Sources: Round42 Broadcom optical/PCB reference.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for OPTICAL_NETWORKING_AI_DATACENTER; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Hyperscaler contract and price reaction are aligned; rerating size and backlog conversion need validation. Sources: Reuters Meta Corning fiber contract.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for AI_CHIP_FABRIC_INFRA; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Event reaction is useful, but Stage 3 needs production, yield, and revenue conversion. Sources: Reuters Tower Semiconductor AI chip deal.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for INDUSTRIAL_GASES_SEMICONDUCTOR_INFRA; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Semiconductor gas supply is a duration/utility-style case, not a high-beta theme case. Sources: Round42 Air Liquide Micron gas plant reference.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for AI_DATA_CENTER_COOLING; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: AI cooling can be Green-capable if thermal bottleneck turns into repeat revenue and margin. Sources: Round42 Ecolab CoolIT cooling reference.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for NEOCLOUD_GPU_RENTAL; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Neocloud can show backlog, but debt, GPU depreciation, FCF, and customer concentration keep it high-risk Watch. Sources: Round42 CoreWeave IPO/neocloud reference.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for DATA_CENTER_REIT_INFRASTRUCTURE; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Data-center property demand is not enough if cash yield, lease duration, and funding-cost evidence are weak. Sources: Round42 Blackstone data-center REIT reference.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for REDTEAM_ACCOUNTING_TRUST_OVERLAY; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: AI server growth cannot overcome auditor resignation or filing/trust breakdown; this is a hard RedTeam case. Sources: Reuters Supermicro EY resignation.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for AI_SERVER_ODM_EMS_SUPPLY_CHAIN; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Server revenue growth without margin, inventory, trust, and customer-quality evidence should not become Green. Sources: Round42 ODM risk note.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for COMMODITY_MEMORY_GENERAL_SEMI; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Commodity memory recovery can work, but HBM lag and supply rebound risk keep it below HBM-quality Green until proven. Sources: Round42 Samsung memory recovery note.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for AI_ACCELERATOR_CHIP_PUREPLAY; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: AI accelerator pure-play stays Watch/Red unless customers, commercial revenue, and margin are verified. Sources: Round42 Cerebras AI accelerator reference.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for COMMODITY_MEMORY_GENERAL_SEMI; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Price-only memory rebounds should be capped when supply and customer CAPEX can reverse the cycle. Sources: Round42 commodity memory false-positive note.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for ADVANCED_PACKAGING_COWOS_EMIB; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Packaging bottleneck can be Green early, but capacity expansion and bottleneck easing create 4B-watch. Sources: Round42 advanced packaging 4B note.

evidence_summary: Round42 R2 case for NEOCLOUD_GPU_RENTAL; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: GPU rental growth can break when debt, FCF, GPU obsolescence, or customer concentration overwhelms contracts. Sources: Round42 neocloud 4C note.
